name: Chitin Governance
description: Execution kernel for AI coding agents — gate every tool call through chitin policy and record a hash-linked event chain.

kernelPath.label: chitin-kernel binary
kernelPath.help: Absolute path to the chitin-kernel binary. Defaults to PATH lookup.

mode.label: Gate mode
mode.help: enforce = deny disallowed tool calls. observe = log only, never block.

workerMode.label: Worker mode
workerMode.help: When enabled, applies chitin's worker bootstrap rules (no-trunk-write, no-pr-merge, no-recursive-delete, ToS-driver allowlist).

denyOnError.label: Fail closed on bridge error
denyOnError.help: If the kernel binary is missing or times out, deny the tool call (true) or allow it (false).
